description_long: This is a large, L-shaped executive desk with a rich, dark wood grain finish and a modern design. The desk features two sets of drawers: one set of two drawers on the left return and a set of three drawers on the right pedestal, each with metallic handles. A metallic accent strip runs along the top surface, adding a contemporary touch. The desk has a solid, blocky construction with thick panels and a spacious work surface, suitable for multiple monitors or paperwork. The left return is supported by a solid panel and a drawer unit, while the right side is supported by a full pedestal. The overall appearance is professional and robust, ideal for an office or reception area.
description: A large, L-shaped executive desk with dark wood grain, metallic handles, and accent strip, featuring multiple drawers and a spacious work surface.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the L-shape, both drawer units, and the metallic accent strip on the main surface.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the solid back panel and the overhanging left return, with the metallic accent visible.
description_view_2: Side view of the left return, showing the supporting panel and the depth of the desk's surfaces.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the three right-side drawers, two left-side drawers, and the open leg space beneath the main work surface.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long section with three drawers and open leg space, while the left return with two drawers extends to the side; metallic handles and accent strip indicate the front.
